summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Security-sensitive open PRs are quarantined with route_security. Non-security open PRs are kept non-mutating because they are draft/need proof or are protected by maintainer-label cleanup constraints. Already closed PR #86207 is kept closed only.

actions.reason: Open draft maintainer-owned gateway PR with failing proof and review-bot context; keep it as related inventory work without mutation.
Security-boundary trust/pinning PR is out of scope for Clownfish cleanup and must go to central OpenClaw security handling.
Standalone automation logging PR; not a dedupe candidate and not safe for merge/closure in plan mode.
Substantively superseded by hydrated #86578, but protected maintainer label/maintainer signal blocks automatic close planning in this shard.
Already closed; no mutation should be emitted.

Workflow template-injection and trust-boundary remediation belongs to central OpenClaw security handling.
